pageConfig.title: USCG-Approved First Aid / CPR / AED
pageConfig.subtitle: AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED Total — AMERHA-216
pageConfig.meta_description: AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED Total options for captain's license, OUPV, Master, and Merchant Mariner Credential applicants who need AMERHA-216 USCG documentation.
pageConfig.intro: Select the AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED format, then choose a public date and start time.
pageConfig.explanation: This page is a local cover page for mariners and captain's license applicants. It uses the same real AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED classes already available through 910CPR; it does not create separate USCG classroom inventory.

documentation_note.title: USCG documentation path
documentation_note.body: Students who complete all required sections can receive the AHA course completion card and AMERHA-216 USCG documentation for the First Aid / CPR / AED requirement.
bullets: For captain's license, OUPV, Master, and Merchant Mariner Credential applicants.
Complete every required AMERHA-216 section for the documentation path.
Bring photo ID and tell the instructor you need USCG/mariner documentation.

pageConfig.student_note: The blended option is online learning plus an in-person skills session, so students still attend the scheduled skills session.
